name: Search bar
description: A labeled text input paired with a submit button for searching a collection.

code.code:
<form role="search" onSubmit={handleSearch}>
  <TextInput aria-label="Search" placeholder="Search…" value={query} onChange={onChange} />
  <Button type="submit" text="Search" tone="primary" />
</form>

useCases.description: Let users query a list or dataset from the top of a view.

guidelines.guidance: Give the input an accessible label even when a visible label is omitted.
guidelines.rationale: A placeholder is not a label; screen reader users need a programmatic name to know what the field searches.
